cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Ms. Aadhya Singh? Sir, I'm calling from HDFC Bank.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes, this is Aadhya. What's this about, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Good morning, Ms. Singh. I'm calling to inform you that as per the RBI's new repo rate, the interest rate on your floating-rate home loan has been revised.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, okay. What's the new rate, please? Thik hai, tell me.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: The new interest rate will be 8.5% per annum. You will receive a detailed notification via email and SMS shortly.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 36s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An agent from a bank ([BANK_NAME]) calls to inform a customer that the interest rate on their floating-rate home loan has been revised as per the RBI's new repo rate.
